error_signature: Google credential expires after a certain time
title: Google Docs credentials expire in testing mode
symptom: The Google Docs node fails randomly, requiring re-login to Google to function again.
applies_when: Google Cloud Console is in testing mode
not_this_if: Google Cloud Console is set to production mode
root_cause: When the Google Cloud Console is in testing mode, the credentials generated have a limited lifespan, causing them to expire and necessitating re-authentication in n8n.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud Console
Change the project mode from testing to production
Re-login to n8n with the updated credentials
agent_instruction: Change the Google Cloud Console mode to production and re-login to n8n.
